race.comment: CELLARMASTER (14) will appreciate the drop in weight fifth-up and Zac Lloyd hops back aboard from the good gate. Just under a month between runs when taken to the front for a gritty second over 1600m at Newcastle with the 60.5kg. Meets some better types this time and this looks well within his grasp. PIPERITA (9) back in class when she finished over the top of them for a decisive win over 1350m at Wyong in BM64 grade. Gets a better set-up tonight with Roper's claim and adept in all conditions. Top-three prospect. IVAN'S HERO (5) tough gelding on the quick backup. Faded late from the sticky draw when third over this course and distance last Friday night in BM78 class. Comes back a level and sure to be thereabouts. MALABAR (11) racing well for the new yard and looks near his peak third-up. Can roll across from the awkward gate and take a hand in the finish. The chances don't end there.
